title: Board Access Troubleshooting
objective: Diagnose board access failures across meetings, workspaces, documents, and packet generation.

steps.description: Capture the actor, meeting, and exact asset that failed.
Verify the actor can view the board module and the specific meeting asset.
Check drive folder linkage, document association, and packet readiness.
Produce approved next steps such as workspace preparation, document relinking, or role correction.

escalation_rules: Escalate to permission_diagnostics when role mapping is the primary blocker.
Escalate to system_health_diagnostics when board workspace links repeatedly fail.
